summary: A Storm Shadow missile struck the Kremniy El plant in Bryansk at 16:55 on March 10, causing significant damage to production facilities after being detected over the Pogarsky district at 16:52. In Dobropole, a Ukrainian MaxxPro armored vehicle was destroyed by a fiber-optic FPV drone "Barmaley." The "Rubicon" Center reported 162 targets destroyed on March 10 across multiple directions, including Donbas and Sumy, with operations involving FPV air defense against Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs. Ukrainian forces are experiencing increased use of "Molnias" (lightning drones), which are difficult to counter due to their passive signal reception, while the arrival of BM-35 and BM-70 drones has sharply declined, likely due to production issues, intensified electronic warfare, and Starlink disconnections. A Russian soldier was hit by two Ukrainian FPV drones simultaneously while hiding behind a tree.
